business.name: PREFERRED HANDYMAN SERVICES LLC
business.tagline: The fix you've been looking for

hero.headline: When Charleston *homeowners* need it done right
hero.subheadline: From buckled floors to gorgeous new decks — we fix what others mess up and build what lasts.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every project handled
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to complete builds

services.title: Floor Repair & Replacement
services.description: Moisture damage, buckling, subflooring — we fix what went wrong and make it last. No shortcuts, no do-overs.

services.title: Custom Deck Building
services.description: Beautiful outdoor spaces built to handle Charleston weather. Stairs, railings, the whole thing done in a week.

services.title: Bathroom Renovations
services.description: Tile work, drywall repair, shower resealing. We know where moisture problems start and how to stop them.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: Proper prep work, quality materials, clean finish. Porches, bathrooms, whole rooms — it all gets the same care.

services.title: Electrical & Fan Installation
services.description: Ceiling fans, outlets, lighting fixtures. Safe installation that passes inspection every time.

about.heading: Built for Charleston's challenges
about.body: We know this city — the moisture, the weather, the quirks of older homes. When other contractors leave problems unfixed, Charleston homeowners call us to make it right. Every repair is done to last, every build is done to code, and every customer gets straight answers about what needs to happen.

reviews.name: Nancy C.
reviews.text: Honest work, outstanding results. Fixed major moisture damage to my beams and joists — floors and tiles look brand new.

reviews.name: Cia C.
reviews.text: Beautiful new deck plus painting and ceiling fan work. Professional quality, thorough, and always answered my questions.

reviews.name: Eileen R.
reviews.text: Built a gorgeous deck in under a week. Professional, friendly, respectful — even the stairs impressed me!

reviews.name: Sue H.
reviews.text: Had to fix another crew's terrible work on my buckled floors. They ripped it all out and did it right this time.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston & beyond
service_areas.subheading: Professional handyman services throughout the Lowcountry

cta.heading: Ready to get it done right?
cta.body: No project too big or small. Free estimates on all work. Call today and let's talk about what you need fixed or built.
